---
title: 'Merchandise'
date: '1980-01-02T05:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'N2 Good Success Resource Center'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5243185156892226225'
blogger_filename: '/1980/01/merchandise.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/N2 Good Success Resource Center/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<li>Please see the&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a>&nbsp;for motivational products.&nbsp;</li>
<li>You can also design your own things here. Ever wanted your FAVORITE verse or saying on a mug? Do it here, at Zazzle!&nbsp;</li>
<br />
<div>
<embed flashvars="feedId=0&amp;path=http://www.zazzle.com/assets/swf/zp/skins" height="300" src="http://www.zazzle.com/utl/getpanel?tl=My%20Zazzle%20Panel&amp;at=238174440691742196&amp;cn=238174440691742196&amp;st=date_created" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="450" wmode="transparent"></embed></div>
<div>
<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/">make custom gifts</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/">Zazzle</a></div>
<div>
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" /></div>
<script>
  (function(i,s,o,g,r,a,m){i['GoogleAnalyticsObject']=r;i[r]=i[r]||function(){
  (i[r].q=i[r].q||[]).push(arguments)},i[r].l=1*new Date();a=s.createElement(o),
  m=s.getElementsByTagName(o)[0];a.async=1;a.src=g;m.parentNode.insertBefore(a,m)
  })(window,document,'script','//www.google-analytics.com/analytics.js','ga');

  ga('create', 'UA-45348214-1', 'n2gs.blogspot.com');
  ga('send', 'pageview');

</script>
